parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'accepted', message: 'Document generation started', document_type: $json.body?.document_type || 'unknown' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 8192, temperature: 0, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'document_drafter', event_type: 'generation', summary: 'Generated ' + $('Build DOCX').first().json.document_type + ' draft: ' + $('Build DOCX').first().json.document_title, document_url: 'governance/' + $('Build DOCX').first().json.storage_path, data_snapshot: { document_type: $('Build DOCX').first().json.document_type, context: $('Build DOCX').first().json.context }, quarter: $('Build DOCX').first().json.quarter, fiscal_year: $('Build DOCX').first().json.fiscal_year }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Faith & Harmony ', to: [$env.FOUNDER_EMAIL], subject: 'Document Draft Ready: ' + $('Build DOCX').first().json.document_type.replace(/_/g, ' '), html: '

Document Draft Generated

A new ' + $('Build DOCX').first().json.document_type.replace(/_/g, ' ') + ' draft has been generated.

ATTORNEY REVIEW REQUIRED
This document contains [ATTORNEY REVIEW] placeholders that must be reviewed by a qualified attorney before execution.

Download Draft (DOCX)

This link expires in 7 days.

' }) }}
